item.title: Important steps in data science
item.description:
(All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
Important steps when you’re starting to put your hands into Data Science I’m aware that once I get to actually work with ML and DS, things might change (and certainly sum up) from what I’ve written here.

item.title: Collaborate to develop
item.description:
Tools for (collaborate) and learn (All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
A little while ago I discovered Wikibooks and I found the initiative very interesting. In summary, Wikibooks is a collaborative project for authoring and editing books. An ‘Important sister project’ from Wikipedia, as described on the page.

item.title: Learning is easier when you enjoy the process (and have patience) - my experience with english
item.description:
How I learned (and continue) learning English in my life (All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
When I think of subjects that I can use to train my writing, but that at the same time that I already feel comfortable to bring ideas and value to other that may happen to read, perhaps the first thing that comes to mind is English.

item.title: Data science and machine learning at first
item.description:
Initial impressions on data science and machine learning (All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
Objective: register some of my understanding on those topics at the moment, the beggining of my more in-depth learning journey. Reason: since I’m on a journey towards learning all I can about the subjects, I want to be able to compare my initial understanding with my future understanding.
